description: Concordance table mapping IPC patent classification codes to NACE Rev. 2 industry classification codes with conditional logic.

columns.name: ipc
columns.description: IPC classification code being mapped to industry codes.

columns.name: not_with_ipc
columns.description: IPC codes that, if present, exclude this mapping (negative condition).

columns.name: unless_with_ipc
columns.description: IPC codes that must be present for this mapping to apply (positive condition).

columns.name: nace2_code
columns.description: NACE Rev. 2 industry classification code assigned through this mapping.

columns.name: nace2_weight
columns.description: Weight indicating the strength or confidence of this IPC-to-NACE mapping.

columns.name: nace2_descr
columns.description: Description of the NACE Rev. 2 industry category.
